title: PoliceCraft
description: This mod adds items for the police.
body:
# This mod adds items for the police.

> **Why was this mod created?**
> **This mod can be used in TV shows, on RP servers**

> **Is this mod optimized?**
> **Yes, this mod is optimized so that there are no unnecessary things.
> There are only things for the officer.**

> **What are the things in this mod?**
- **Officer's club**
- **Officer badge**
- **Police cap**
